nodes.name: .env-ci
nodes.summary: Environment variable defaults loaded during continuous-integration test runs for the Flagsmith API.

nodes.name: .env-local
nodes.summary: Environment variable defaults for local development of the Flagsmith API server and database.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Build and developer-workflow automation defining 28 targets for installing dependencies, linting, type-checking, running tests, managing Docker services, applying Django migrations, serving the app, and generating OpenAPI SDK and integration client types.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses .PHONY targets and per-target variable assignments (e.g. OPENAPI_SERVERS) to parameterise OpenAPI generation.

nodes.name: Procfile
nodes.summary: Process-type declaration defining the release migration step and the gunicorn-served web process for the Flagsmith WSGI application.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide for the Flagsmith API covering local setup, testing, metrics, structured logging, feature flags, migrations, typing, and the Django app architecture conventions.

nodes.name: openapi-filter-flagsmith-sdk.yml
nodes.summary: openapi-format filter rules used when generating the published Flagsmith SDK OpenAPI schema, controlling operationIds, inverse tags, and unused-component pruning.

nodes.name: openapi-filter-grafana.yaml
nodes.summary: openapi-format filter rules for trimming the upstream Grafana OpenAPI spec down to the operations needed to generate the Grafana integration client types.

nodes.name: openapi-filter-launchdarkly.yaml
nodes.summary: openapi-format filter rules for trimming the upstream LaunchDarkly OpenAPI spec down to the operations needed to generate the LaunchDarkly integration client types.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Central Python project manifest declaring dependencies and optional extras and configuring the build backend, uv package sources, Ruff linting/formatting, coverage, pytest, and Mypy strict type checking with Django/DRF stubs.
nodes.languageNotes: Consolidates tool configuration (ruff, mypy, pytest, coverage, uv) into a single PEP 621 project file with multiple [[tool.mypy.overrides]] tables for per-module type strictness.
